texts.item.iron-sword.description: A dependable blade with enough nicks to have its own opinions.
texts.item.wooden-shield.description: A round shield that has met more arguments than arrows.
texts.item.leather-armor.description: Practical leather armor. It smells faintly of rain and old victories.
texts.item.leather-boots.description: Scuffed leather boots. They know exactly how to leave a room dramatically.
texts.item.leather-helm.description: A humble helm for keeping ambitious ceiling beams at bay.
texts.item.power-ring.description: A small ring that makes carrying a sword feel like a personal statement.
texts.item.spirit-charm.description: A quiet charm said to keep one's courage from wandering off.
